title: Stoneworked
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PKgnvJ5JMTg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Curseforge page is [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stoneworked)

![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/948/329/stoneworked.png)

Stoneworked is a building/exploration mod that adds 150+ new blocks! Perfect for someone who likes to build, as this mod offers many new block palettes!



# New Blocks

Granite, Diorite, and Andesite Bricks:

![Stone Brick Types](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/948/996/minecraft-forge_-1.png)

These are new decorative variants to the vanilla stone blocks that most people throw out with a whole new look! (There are also Polished Wall variants for the three stones)



Carved Stone Bricks:

![Carved Stone Bricks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/948/992/2024-08-23_14.png)

These variants of Stone Bricks are pretty much the same, except for the fact that they have a slightly smaller bricks texture.



Calcite Variants:

![Calcite Variants](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/948/993/2024-08-23_14.png)

Calcite now has some new variants that are added with this mod. These include stairs, slabs, and walls for raw calcite, along with Polished and Brick variants.



Dolerite:

![Dolerite](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/948/994/2024-08-23_14.png)

A stone found commonly in the Deepslate layer that has three sizes of decorative tiles. It is a nice black block that would look good in a kitchen build.



Ashy Stone:

![Ashy Stone](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/948/995/2024-08-23_14.png)

A rare variant of stone that is found in the Ashen Jungle most commonly. It is found very rarely in any Overworld Biome.



Orun Shale:

![Orun Shale](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/29/2024-08-23_15.png)

An orange-colored stone found in the Mountain Springs biome. It cannot be found in any other biome, but it can be found in stone Ruins.





Basalt Bricks:

![Basalt Bricks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/30/2024-08-23_15.png)

New decorative blocks for Basalt that are crafted from either Polished or Smooth Basalt. It is found very commonly in Bastions.





Soul Sandstone:

![Soul Sandstone](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/31/2024-08-23_15.png)

Decorative blocks that can be made of Soul Sand of traded from Piglins. It comes in every variant that Sandstone comes in.





Marble:

![Marble](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/34/2024-08-23_15.png)

A common Nether stone found in most vanilla Nether biomes. It can be made into 20+ different blocks.



Asteroid:

![Asteroid Stone](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/35/2024-08-23_15.png)

An uncommon stone found in the End and in Mountain biomes. Iron ore can be found in this stone if it is in the Overworld.





Obsidian Bricks:

![Obsidian Variants](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/36/2024-08-23_15.png)

These are decorative versions of obsidian. Great for making a blast-proof bunker.





Decorative Gold Variants:

![Decorative Gold](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/38/2024-08-23_15.png)

These blocks are perfect for making a lavish mansion or treasure hoard. They can be found in all Bastion types.





Carpeted Stairs:

![Carpeted Stairs](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/40/2024-08-23_15.png)

Wool versions of stair blocks. They will block vibrations and can be found in Ancient Cities.





Lead Ore:

![Lead Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/41/2024-08-23_15.png)

A new ore that is in between Iron and Diamond. It is found in any Overworld biome, with it being more common in Ashen Jungles.





Celesteel Ore:

![Celesteel Ore](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/42/2024-08-23_15.png)

The End's version of copper that can be found in any End biome. Upgrade Templates can be found in End Cities, which can be used on Netherite Gear.





Polished Amethyst:

![Polished Amethyst](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1039/920/minecraft_-forge-loading.png)

This block set can be made out of Amethyst Blocks.





Snow Bricks:

![Snow Bricks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1039/921/minecraft_-forge-loading.png)

These decorative blocks can be crafted out of snow blocks or found in Igloos. They will turn into snowballs when mined without Silk Touch.

Terracotta Bricks:

![Terracotta Bricks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1418/542/terracotta-bricks-png.png)

this block set with 68 different types can be made with terracotta of any color. Perfect for adding color to a build!





Presents:

![Presents](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1039/919/minecraft-forge_-1.png)

These small decorative blocks are made out of Wool and a Gold Ribbon, which can be crafted with String and Gold Nuggets. They have one inventory slot that can hold up to 64 items.



# New Biomes

Ashen Jungle:

![Ashen Jungle](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/46/2024-08-23_15.png)

A very rare variant of the Jungle biome that contains smaller trees and an abundance of Ashy Stone and Lead.



Golden Plains:

![Golden Plains](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/43/2024-08-23_15.png)

A common variant of the Plains biome that has more trees and trace amounts of extra Gold.



Mountain Spring:

![Mountain Spring](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/949/45/2024-08-23_15.png)

A rare mountain biome that contains water ponds and trees. This is the only place that Orun Shale can be found naturally.



# New Structure

Stonework Ruins:

![Stonework Ruins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1418/543/stonework-ruins-png.png)

These are small buried structures found in Shrublands, Badlands, and Mountain biomes. A new Armor Trim is found here.



# Links



Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
